failure_modes.name: Balance / count-balance totals
failure_modes.description: Sums and counts fail to reconcile at plan, fund, or participant level.
failure_modes.remediation: Drill from plan variance to money type, investment, then participant.

failure_modes.name: Loan outstanding-balance carry-over
failure_modes.description: Converted loan balances diverge from source due to accrual and payment-application differences.
failure_modes.remediation: Recompute amortization from origination; verify payment application order.
